rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. RICHARD KIWATA
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 10, 2023 line 1. CROSS-DEFENDANT RICHARD KIWATA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT is DENIED. Moving party was properly sub-served at 201 California and does not meet the requirements of CCP 473.5 for setting aside the default/judgment in this matter. =(501/HEK) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: SAMIR HINN ET AL VS. DIANA TOM SHARE TRUST ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Settlement And Application For Determination Of Good Fatih Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 10, 2023 line 2. PLAINTIFFS' APPLICAITON FOR DETERMINATION OF GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT is GRANTED. The Tech-Built factors weigh in favor of finding that the settlement was reached in good faith. The Court further notes that a determination independently made in a related matter is accorded significant weight. =(501/HEK) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC VS. GARY WAITE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Set Aside Stipulated Judgment Due To Diminished Capacity
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 10, 2023 line 9. DEFENDANTS GARY WAITE AND DARRYL BYRD'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE STIPULATED JUDGMENT DUE TO DIMINISHED CAPACITY is continued to August 4, 2023. No later than July 28, 2023 Defendant to file and serve medical evidence re: capacity referenced in the moving papers. Plaintiff may file a supplemental opposition limited to addressing Defendants' filings pursuant to this ruling no later than August 2, 2023. The Court notes that Plaintiff waived the insufficient notice issue by addressing the motion on the merits. =(501/HEK) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
